Name: GraphicsConfig_LightingQuality_win64
Description: Determines the parameters of each lighting quality level.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Distance Factor
Fields.Description: The player local light's effective distance coefficient (smaller, it disappears at a short distance)

Fields.Name: Local Light: Enable Shadows
Fields.Description: If ON, the player local light can create shadows.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Enable Forward Pass Lighting
Fields.Description: If ON, forward pass lighting is used. this means each object is drawn one by one. Whereas deferred rendering means all information for each object is rendered into multiple buffers first.

Fields.Name: Local Light: Shadow Specular Level
Fields.Description: The local light's maximum shadow specular level. The larger the value, the more light sources will be shadowed.
